title: Ship private continuity resolver and package guard
description: Add startup continuity resolution for actor/repo/venture/private state and block continuity artifacts from npm pack/publish. Commit and push the validated slice on feat/think-and-build.
acceptance_criteria: delimit status reports resolved continuity context
commit pushed without losing unrelated work

note: Validated current feat/think-and-build dirty slice under Delimit governance. npm test: 106/106 pass. security-check.sh passes. Preparing governed commit and push for continuity resolver, package guard, hook updates, new gateway modules, and repo governance files.

title: Simplify native Delimit shell startup and in-session venture navigation
description: Make the native Delimit shell intuitive from neutral directories. Portfolio mode should be the default home screen, active ventures should be visible, and users should be able to open/build/switch ventures from inside the shell without re-running CLI commands. Worker state should expose simple execution phase instead of leaking raw state files.
acceptance_criteria: bare delimit from a neutral directory opens portfolio home; portfolio home shows active ventures; open/build/switch/portfolio commands transition sessions directly inside the shell; worker state shows ready/idle execution phase; home directory does not collapse into repo mode
context: Implemented in npm-delimit session-shell, session-worker, continuity-resolver, and cross-model-hooks. Remaining gap is autonomous governed execution by the background worker.

note: Completed the native Delimit shell UX pass. Neutral startup now opens portfolio home, portfolio shows active ventures, open/build/switch/portfolio transitions work inside the shell, worker state exposes ready/idle, and the home directory no longer collapses into repo mode.

title: Make native Delimit worker execute governed ledger items autonomously
description: Extend the native Delimit worker from execution-state continuity into a real governed executor. The worker should move beyond selecting and describing the current ledger item and begin running controlled, auditable execution phases for build-safe items.
acceptance_criteria: worker maintains explicit phases beyond ready/idle; worker can claim one build-safe ledger item and advance it through governed execution states; task brief
and ledger updates stay in sync; root-level build/worker status reflects live execution without exposing raw state mechanics
context: The shell, startup discovery, active-venture memory, self-healing worker revival, task brief emission, and execution logging are now in place. The remaining gap is actual autonomous governed execution of ledger items.
